name: Peoples First Savings Bank
description_short: Community bank headquartered in Mason, Ohio offering checking, savings, mortgages, loans, and investment services with two local branch locations.
description_long:
Peoples First Savings Bank is a community-focused financial institution based in Mason, Ohio, with branch locations in Mason and Morrow. The bank emphasizes its position as a local alternative to larger national banks while offering competitive product features and rates. The institution operates as a full-service bank providing deposit accounts, lending products, and investment advisory services to personal and business customers across the Cincinnati area.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, credit cards with rewards programs, personal and mortgage loans, home equity lines of credit, certificates of deposit, and investment services through Joe Duffey of Everest Financial. Their mortgage offerings feature a "zero closing cost" program for primary residence purchases and refinances. Deposit accounts include free online banking, bill pay, mobile banking with check deposit functionality, fee-free ATM access, and FDIC insurance. Credit cards offer 0% intro APR for 12 months with no annual fee and points rewards. Current promotional rates include 6-month CDs at 3.75% APY.

Peoples First distinguishes itself through local decision-making and personalized service as a smaller community bank. They emphasize ease of account opening and switching, quick loan turnaround times, and integration of investment advisory services. The bank markets itself as "A Top Bank in America Right Here in Mason" and positions local presence and accessibility as key differentiators from larger institutions.

The bank's limitations include only two physical branch locations, restricting access to customers in the greater Cincinnati area. Limited information is provided on the website regarding specific loan rates, credit requirements, or detailed product terms. The "zero closing cost" mortgage offer contains significant restrictions and exclusions. Business lending options are mentioned but not detailed on the website. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts with free online banking and bill pay
Savings accounts with competitive interest rates and free mobile app
Credit cards with rewards points (merchandise, travel, activities) and 0% intro APR for 12 months
Mortgage loans for purchase, refinance, and primary residence transactions
Home equity loans and lines of credit
Personal loans and lines of credit
Investment advisory services including retirement strategies, health insurance, estate planning, and Social Security analysis
Mobile banking application with balance checks, transfers, and mobile check deposit
Visa debit cards with fee-free ATM access
Free identity theft protection (2 levels available)
Business banking services (mentioned but not detailed)
pros: Zero closing cost mortgages for primary residence purchases and refinances (excludes many loan types)
Free online banking, bill pay, mobile banking with mobile check deposit for deposit account holders
Fee-free ATM access and direct deposit for checking accounts
Credit cards with 0% intro APR for 12 months and no annual fee
FDIC insurance on deposits provides account security up to standard limits
Investment advisory services available through CLU-designated professional (Joe Duffey)
Mobile app allows balance checks, transfers, and check deposits from smartphone/tablet
cons: Only two branch locations (Mason and Morrow, Ohio) limits geographic accessibility
Zero closing cost mortgage offer has extensive restrictions and exclusions (no construction loans, blanket mortgages, lot loans, land loans, bridge loans, some secondary market products)
Limited loan rate and terms information provided on website; rates not transparently displayed
No clear indication of business lending products or capabilities despite mentioning business services
Weekend hours limited to Saturday morning only in Mason; Morrow branch closed weekends
best_for: Homebuyers and homeowners in the Cincinnati area seeking mortgage refinancing or purchase loans
Local customers in Mason and Morrow, Ohio wanting community bank relationship and service
Individuals seeking credit cards with rewards and introductory 0% APR period
Savers interested in competitive CD rates and FDIC-insured deposit products
diagnosis: Peoples First Savings Bank is best for customers in the Mason/Morrow, Ohio area seeking traditional community bank services with competitive deposit rates and mortgage options. Primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank's utility is restricted to customers with physical access to or proximity to its two Ohio branches; online-only customers in other states would find limited digital banking advantages compared to national banks or neobanks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
